li.span: E-stop: immediate shutdown via ISR and physical power cut; FSM handles follow-up processing
Endstops and start button: cyclic processing via InputSampler

ul.li: Door sensor: immediate software stop via ISR, no physical power cut; FSM handles follow-up processing

li.span: Conectivity Task Low Priority auf Core1
MQTT Befehle werden gequeued um vom Controller abgearbeitet zu werden
